recommendations.title: Cyborg
recommendations.overview: A martial artist hunts a killer in a plague-infested urban dump of the future.

recommendations.title: Kickboxer 4: The Aggressor
recommendations.overview: David Sloan must travel to Mexico to save his wife from a savage international terrorist.

recommendations.title: Ticker

recommendations.title: The Sword and the Sorcerer
recommendations.overview: A mercenary with a three-bladed sword rediscovers his royal heritage when he is recruited to help a princess foil a brutal tyrant and a powerful sorcerer's plans to conquer the land.

recommendations.title: Kickboxer 2: The Road Back
recommendations.overview: In this rousing sequel to Kickboxer, Tong Po broods about his defeat at the hands of Kurt Sloan. Po and his managers resort to drastic measures to goad Kurt's brother into the ring for a rematch.

recommendations.title: The Unthinkable
recommendations.overview: Sweden faces a mysterious attack while Alex tries to reunite with his youth love, Anna.
